revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23125537382|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Army%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{documentation subpage}} {{High-use|10,000}} ==Usage== {{army|nation|variant|size=optional|name=optional}} Produces a flag icon attached to a wikilinked national army article. ;Parameters *''nation'' — Use either the name of the nation or the three-letter [[:en:ISO 3166-1 alpha-3|ISO 3166-1 alpha-3]] country code *''variant'' (optional) — Specifies an alternate (historical) army flag to use. This parameter is documented by the appropriate template in [[:Category:Country data templates]]. Note that the standard behaviour of this template is to use the army variant if present, so there is no need to specify this variant in the template call. *''size'' (optional) — Can be used to change the flag icon size *''name'' (optional) — Can be used to change the wikilink display text ==Examples== *{{army|United Kingdom}} → {{army|United Kingdom}} *{{army|US}} → {{army|US}} *{{army|CHN}} → {{army|CHN}} *{{army|Republic of China (1912–1949)}} → {{army|Republic of China (1912–1949)}} *{{army|Empire of Japan}} → {{army|Empire of Japan}} *{{army|Empire of Japan|name=Japan}} → {{army|Empire of Japan|name=Japan}} *{{army|India}} → {{army|India}} *{{army|Pakistan}} → {{army|Pakistan}} *{{army|Bangladesh}} → {{army|Bangladesh}} *{{army|Canada}} → {{army|Canada}} *{{army|Spain}} → {{army|Spain}} *{{army|France}} → {{army|France}} *{{army|Switzerland}} → {{army|Switzerland}} ==Other related templates== The {{tl|flag icon}} template can be used to display the flag by itself, using the army variant as a template parameter: *{{flag icon|United Kingdom|army}} → {{flag icon|United Kingdom|army}} *{{flag icon|United States|army}} → {{flag icon|United States|army}} *{{flag icon|Empire of Japan|army}} → {{flag icon|Empire of Japan|army}} *{{flag icon|Taiwan|army}} → {{flag icon|Taiwan|army}} ==Implementation notes== By default, this template shows the standard national flag for the selected country, following by a wikilink to "''Country'' Army". Either or both of these items can be changed by adding specific parameters to the appropriate country_data template (complete set found in [[:Category:Country data templates]]). To use a different flag, such as an army-specific flag for the nation, use: :flag alias-army = ''image name'' To use a different name for the wikilinked army article, use: :link alias-army = ''article name'' == Template Data == {{TemplateDataHeader}} { "params": { "1": { "label": "nation", "description": "Use either the name of the nation or the three-letter ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code", "required": true, "example": "\"Taiwan\", \"USA\", \"CHN\", \"French Republic\", \"MEX\"", "type": "line" }, "2": { "aliases": [ "variant" ], "label": "variant", "description": "Specifies an alternate (historical) army flag to use. This parameter is documented by the appropriate template in [[:en:Category:Country data templates|Category:Country data templates]]. Note that the standard behaviour of this template is to use the army variant if present, so there is no need to specify this variant in the template call.", "type": "line" }, "size": { "description": "(optional) Can be used to change the flag icon size", "type": "string" }, "name": { "description": "(optional) Can be used to change the wikilink display text", "type": "line" } }, "description": "Produces a flag icon attached to a wikilinked national army article.", "format": "inline" } ==See also== * [[Template:Air force]] * [[:en:Template:Navy|Template:Navy]] {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Flag template system]] [[Category:Army templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
